landing.hero_subtitle: Match resumes to job descriptions instantly with advanced AI scoring, ATS optimization, and actionable insights.
landing.trusted_by: Trusted by recruiters and job seekers worldwide
landing.features_subtitle: Everything you need to optimize your hiring process
landing.feature_ai_desc: Advanced semantic analysis matches CVs against job descriptions with pinpoint accuracy.
landing.feature_ats_desc: Ensure your resume passes Applicant Tracking Systems with smart formatting suggestions.
landing.feature_skills_desc: Identify missing skills and get actionable recommendations to improve your profile.
landing.auto_fix_desc: Extract the important CV sections, normalize them for ATS, and optionally apply a fact-preserving AI rewrite.
landing.auto_fix_builder_ready: Optimized CV loaded into CV Builder.
landing.auto_fix_builder_failed: Could not prepare CV Builder data
landing.auto_fix_unsynced_desc: You changed the optimized text after the last CV Builder sync. Opening the builder again will sync the latest version.
landing.feature_multi_desc: Upload CVs in any language. Our AI adapts to your content automatically.
landing.feature_history_desc: Track all your past analyses, compare scores, and monitor improvements over time.
landing.feature_recruiter_desc: Manage candidates, rank top applicants, and streamline your recruitment pipeline.
landing.how_subtitle: Get your CV score in three simple steps
landing.how_step1_desc: Drag & drop your PDF resume or click to browse files.
landing.how_step2_desc: Paste the job posting you're targeting for an accurate match.
landing.how_step3_desc: Receive an instant score with detailed skill breakdown and recommendations.
landing.demo_subtitle: Here's what a real analysis looks like
landing.pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
landing.faq1_a: Currently we support PDF format. Upload your CV as a PDF for the best results.
landing.faq2_q: How accurate is the AI scoring?
landing.faq2_a: Our AI uses semantic analysis, keyword matching, and industry-specific models to deliver highly accurate match scores.
landing.faq3_a: Yes. Your files are processed securely and never stored permanently. We use enterprise-grade encryption.
landing.faq4_q: Can I use it for free?
landing.faq4_a: Yes! Our Free plan includes 3 analyses per day. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
landing.faq5_q: Does it work with any language CV?
landing.faq5_a: Yes. Our AI supports CVs written in English, Turkish, and many other languages.
landing.footer_description: AI-powered resume analysis platform helping job seekers and recruiters make better decisions.

analyze.title: CV Analysis
analyze.upload_desc: Drag & drop your PDF here or click to browse
analyze.job_desc_placeholder:
Paste the job description here...

Example:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in Python, FastAPI, and cloud services...
analyze.file_too_large: File size must be less than 10MB
analyze.autofix_desc: AI or quick optimization, then edit the generated text and export as PDF/DOCX.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.benchmark_not_enough_data: Not enough similar CV data yet for a reliable comparison.
results.benchmark_ahead: Top {pct}% among peers — {delta} pts above average
results.benchmark_behind: Bottom {pct}% among peers — {delta} pts below average
results.premium_locked_desc: Peer benchmark and advanced breakdown are available on Pro/Enterprise.

history.no_history_desc: Your completed analyses will appear here.
history.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this analysis?
history.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?

recruiter.role_required_desc: This section is only available to users with a Recruiter account. Contact your administrator or upgrade your plan.

cv_builder.title: ATS CV Builder
cv_builder.subtitle: Build an ATS-optimized CV that passes automated screening systems
cv_builder.summary_hint: Write a brief summary or leave empty — AI will generate one tailored to the job description.
cv_builder.summary_placeholder: Analytical and results-driven professional with 6+ years of experience...
cv_builder.job_desc_hint: Paste the job description to tailor your CV with matching keywords and skills.
cv_builder.bullets_hint: Use action verbs and measurable results (e.g., 'Increased sales by 25%')
cv_builder.bullet_placeholder: Developed machine learning models using Python...
cv_builder.skills_hint: List your technical and soft skills. AI will categorize and optimize them.
cv_builder.no_certs_hint: No certifications added yet. Click + to add one.
cv_builder.no_projects_hint: No projects added yet. Click + to add one.
cv_builder.pdf_desc: Universal format — Good for direct sharing
cv_builder.prefill_loaded: Optimized CV data loaded into the builder.
cv_builder.prefill_review_desc: This form was prefilled from the ATS auto-fix result. Review the imported sections before generating the final document.
cv_builder.ats_tip_1: Use keywords from the job description — ATS does keyword matching
cv_builder.ats_tip_2: Write measurable results: 'Improved performance by 30%' not 'Worked on performance'
cv_builder.ats_tip_3: Use standard section headers: Summary, Experience, Education, Skills
cv_builder.ats_tip_4: Use bullet points, not long paragraphs
cv_builder.ats_tip_5: List skills as 'Skill – Level' (e.g., Python – Advanced), never use star ratings

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to use this site, you agree to our use of cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_text: We collect information you provide directly, such as your email address and name when you register. When you upload a CV for analysis, we process the document temporarily to generate results. We do not permanently store your uploaded files.
privacy.section2_text: We use your information to provide and improve our CV analysis service, process your analyses, maintain your account, and communicate service updates. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section3_text: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. Uploaded CVs are processed in memory and are not stored after analysis is complete. Account data is stored on secure, encrypted servers.
privacy.section4_text: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences (such as language and theme). We use IP-based location detection to automatically set your language. No third-party advertising trackers are used.
privacy.section5_text: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us or through your account settings. You can delete your account and all associated data from the Settings page.
privacy.section6_text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at support@cvanalyzer.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1_text: By accessing and using CV Analyzer, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.section2_text: CV Analyzer provides AI-powered resume analysis, scoring, and recommendations. Results are generated by machine learning models and should be used as guidance, not as definitive assessments.
terms.section3_text: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when registering. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.
terms.section4_text: Free accounts are limited to 3 analyses per day. Paid plans offer increased limits as described on the Pricing page. We reserve the right to modify pricing and features with reasonable notice.
terms.section5_text: You retain ownership of all content you upload. CV Analyzer and its branding, design, and technology are the intellectual property of the service provider. You may not copy, modify, or redistribute the platform.
terms.section6_text: CV Analyzer is provided as-is. We make no guarantees regarding the accuracy of AI-generated scores or recommendations. We are not liable for hiring decisions made based on our analysis results.
